prompt: 初始化一部名为《雾港来信》的悬疑网文项目，自动组队，目标路径 projects/story/雾港来信，读者承诺是冷峻推理和家庭秘密。
expected: Routes to $story-init, selects team_lineup_mode=auto, writes only projects/story/雾港来信 runtime artifacts, creates team.yaml, STATE.json, MEMORY.md, CONTEXT/, and the 0-初始化 three-file handoff with provenance.

prompt: 新建长篇故事项目《星环债务》，使用自定义团队成员 .agents/skills/team/规划者A 和 .agents/skills/team/审稿者B，要求保留自动规划入口。
expected: Validates every roster member under .agents/skills/team/, locks team.yaml before synthesis, runs planning direct-answer packet, and blocks if any custom roster path leaves the team root.

prompt: 审查 story-init 初始化结果：项目已生成 STATE.json 但缺 MEMORY.md，team.yaml 和 init_handoff.yaml 的 team_lineup_mode 不一致。
expected: Runs review route, reports FAIL-INIT-RUNTIME or FAIL-INIT-HANDOFF with rework targets N3-BOOTSTRAP, N5-TEAM-LOCK, and N7-SYNTHESIS, then requires validator and smoke evidence before pass.

prompt: 初始化电影项目《黑潮计划》，路径写到 projects/story/黑潮计划。
expected: Detects medium_type=aigc_film, blocks story-init writeback, and routes to $aigc-init instead of creating projects/story artifacts.
